commander-roles.name: King
commander-roles.power:
You start with 50 life and have a hidden helper the Knight
Wincon: No oppenents remaining

commander-roles.name: Knight
commander-roles.power:
You are in hidden service to your king prevent his death and if he dies avenge him
Wincon: No opponents remaining or avenge the kings death

commander-roles.name: Sellsword
commander-roles.power:
At the beginning of the game, start an auction where players bid life for your services, if your employer leaves the game you lose
Wincon: Same as your employer

commander-roles.name: Hunter
commander-roles.power:
At the beginning of the game choose a role in play(don't show other players), this role is your target
Wincon: Eliminate your target

commander-roles.name: Bodyguard
commander-roles.power:
At the beginning of the game, start an auction where players bid life for your services, if your employer leaves the game you lose, you CANNOT attack, You have the ability to tap your creatures to intercept creatures attacking your employer as well as being able to put a total of 10 of your life infront of your employer to reduce damage
Wincon: same as your employer

commander-roles.name: Necromancer
commander-roles.power:
One time per game when a player dies and no wincon is fulfilled you may reveal your role and replace their role with the Skelsword, the Skelsword retains 6 permenants and gains 30 life
Wincon: No opponents remaining

commander-roles.name: Twins
commander-roles.power:
Use the power of friendship to defeat your foes
Wincon: No opponents remaining

commander-roles.name: Seer
commander-roles.power:
When you kill a player that has a hidden role reveal your role and guess the opponents role
Wincon: Guess a hidden role correctly

commander-roles.name: Villageidiot
commander-roles.power:
Weaponised stupidity
Wincon: Die without triggering a wincon

commander-roles.name: Glasscannon
commander-roles.power:
You start the game with 30 life, damage you deal is doubled
Wincon: No opponents remaining

commander-roles.name: Warlord
commander-roles.power: Wincon: Deal 30 commander damage total to players

commander-roles.name: Maskedman
commander-roles.power:
At the beginning of the game reveal Maskedman and choose a role from the list that is not in the game. If the role is normally a revealed role play with it revealed
Wincon: Same as the role taken

commander-roles.name: Chaos
commander-roles.power: When you die reveal Chaos and roll 6d6 you gain the result in life and keep 8 permenants

commander-roles.name: Doppleganger
commander-roles.power:
When you kill someone swap roles with the person you killed and heal life equal to half the health your victim had at the start of the turn.
Wincon: Swap roles with someone and achieve their wincon
